name: Kuchel Ackerman
alt_names: クシェル・アッカーマン
description:
__Relatives:__ [Kenny Ackerman](https://anilist.co/character/127443) (Older Brother), [Unnamed Grandfather](https://anilist.co/character/128589/Kenny-no-Ojiisan)

She is a member of the Ackerman clan who ended up working in an underground brothel.

~!ㅤ
Kuchel ended up getting impregnated by one of her clients. Despite her brother's advice, she decided to keep the child. She chose to name him [Levi.](https://anilist.co/character/45627/Levi)!~
